---
title: "Pastebin"
toc: false
show-reading-time: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }

#room-input {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 400px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border: 2px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

#room-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #2c7be5;
}

#paste-area {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 400px;
  padding: 14px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
  border: 2px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
  resize: vertical;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

#paste-area:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #2c7be5;
}

#paste-area:disabled {
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.action-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.action-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  font-size: 13px;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #fafafa;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #555;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.action-btn:hover {
  border-color: #2c7be5;
  color: #2c7be5;
}

.action-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.4;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.action-btn svg {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
}

#status {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

#status.connected {
  color: #28a745;
}

#status.disconnected {
  color: #dc3545;
}

#devices-panel {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: none;
}

#devices-panel h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #555;
  font-weight: 600;
}

#devices-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

#devices-list li {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 6px 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #333;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}

#devices-list li:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.device-icon { font-size: 16px; }
.device-name { flex: 1; }
.device-you {
  font-size: 11px;
  background: #2c7be5;
  color: #fff;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

#image-panel {
  display: none;
  margin-top: 16px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

#image-panel h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #555;
  font-weight: 600;
}

#image-panel img {
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 400px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

#image-panel .image-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
}

#image-panel .image-size {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #888;
  margin-left: auto;
}

#image-warning {
  display: none;
  color: #dc3545;
  font-size: 13px;
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* File sharing panel */
#file-panel {
  margin-top: 16px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: none;
}

#file-panel h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #555;
  font-weight: 600;
}

#file-drop-zone {
  border: 2px dashed #ccc;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 24px;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #777;
  font-size: 14px;
}

#file-drop-zone:hover,
#file-drop-zone.dragover {
  border-color: #2c7be5;
  background: #f0f7ff;
  color: #2c7be5;
}

#file-drop-zone input[type="file"] {
  display: none;
}

#file-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

#file-list li {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #333;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  background: #fff;
}

#file-list li .file-icon { font-size: 16px; }
#file-list li .file-name { flex: 1; word-break: break-all; }
#file-list li .file-size { font-size: 12px; color: #888; white-space: nowrap; }

#file-list li .file-download {
  padding: 4px 10px;
  font-size: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #2c7be5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #2c7be5;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

#file-list li .file-download:hover {
  background: #2c7be5;
  color: #fff;
}

#file-list li .file-remove {
  padding: 4px 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #dc3545;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #dc3545;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

#file-list li .file-remove:hover {
  background: #dc3545;
  color: #fff;
}

#file-upload-progress {
  display: none;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

#file-upload-progress .progress-bar {
  height: 6px;
  background: #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 3px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

#file-upload-progress .progress-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: #2c7be5;
  border-radius: 3px;
  transition: width 0.2s;
  width: 0%;
}

#file-upload-progress .progress-text {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #666;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

#file-warning {
  display: none;
  color: #dc3545;
  font-size: 13px;
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
</style>

<p>Enter a room name then press <strong>Enter</strong> (or <strong>Return</strong>) to create or join a shared clipboard. Anyone using the same room name will see the same content in real time.</p>

<p><strong>Note:</strong> This pastebin is ephemeral. Once all sessions are closed, the content is automatically erased. Nothing is stored permanently. You can also paste screenshots (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V) to share images, and upload text-based files (up to 7 MB). For privacy, use a hard-to-guess room name. Anyone who knows the room name can see and edit the content. This tool is provided as-is with no guarantees. Use at your own risk. Do not share sensitive information such as passwords or personal data.</p>

<input type="text" id="room-input" placeholder="Enter room name..." maxlength="32" />
<div id="room-error" style="color:#e74c3c; font-size:12px; margin-top:4px; display:none;"></div>

<div id="devices-panel">
  <h3>📡 Connected Devices (<span id="device-count">0</span>)</h3>
  <ul id="devices-list"></ul>
</div>

<div class="action-bar">
  <button class="action-btn" id="copy-btn" disabled title="Copy all content">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"/></svg>
    <span>Copy</span>
  </button>
  <button class="action-btn" id="paste-btn" disabled title="Paste from clipboard">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"/><rect x="8" y="2" width="8" height="4" rx="1" ry="1"/></svg>
    <span>Paste</span>
  </button>
</div>

<textarea id="paste-area" placeholder="Start typing here..." disabled></textarea>
<div id="char-counter" style="font-size:12px; color:#888; text-align:right; margin-top:4px; display:none;">1,000,000 characters remaining</div>

<div id="status">Enter a room name to connect.</div>
<div id="limit-warning" style="display:none; color:#dc3545; font-size:14px; margin-top:6px; font-weight:600;">Content limit reached. Unable to save further changes.</div>
<div id="content-qr" style="display:none; margin-top:16px; text-align:center;">
  <canvas id="content-qr-canvas"></canvas>
  <div id="qr-overflow" style="display:none; color:#e67e22; font-size:13px; margin-top:6px;">Content too long for QR code. Use copy instead.</div>
  <div id="qr-label" style="font-size:12px; color:#888; margin-top:6px;">Scan to grab the text</div>
</div>

<div id="image-panel">
  <h3>🖼️ Shared Image</h3>
  <img id="shared-image" alt="Shared image" />
  <div class="image-actions">
    <button class="action-btn" id="copy-image-btn" title="Copy image as PNG to clipboard">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"/></svg>
      <span>Copy as PNG</span>
    </button>
    <button class="action-btn" id="clear-image-btn" title="Remove image">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg>
      <span>Remove</span>
    </button>
    <span class="image-size" id="image-size-label"></span>
  </div>
  <div id="image-warning"></div>
</div>

<div id="file-panel">
  <h3>📁 Shared Files</h3>
  <div id="file-drop-zone">
    <p>📄 Drop text-based files here or click to browse</p>
    <p style="font-size:12px; color:#999; margin:4px 0 0 0;">Max 7 MB per file &bull; Text files only (code, logs, config, documents, etc.)</p>
    <input type="file" id="file-input" multiple />
  </div>
  <div id="file-upload-progress">
    <div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" id="file-progress-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="progress-text" id="file-progress-text">Uploading...</div>
  </div>
  <div id="file-warning"></div>
  <ul id="file-list"></ul>
</div>

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-database-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-app-check-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/qrcode/build/qrcode.min.js"></script>

<script>
(function() {
  const firebaseConfig = {
    apiKey: "AIzaSyDpRFBtX8LUmZmEX7VcIeMxQKQOtLVdf-A",
    authDomain: "oliabak-paste.firebaseapp.com",
    databaseURL: "https://oliabak-paste-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com",
    projectId: "oliabak-paste",
    storageBucket: "oliabak-paste.firebasestorage.app",
    messagingSenderId: "968986695208",
    appId: "1:968986695208:web:fc5f3d37911810b2e0471d"
  };

  firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);

  // App Check with reCAPTCHA v3
  const appCheck = firebase.appCheck();
  appCheck.activate('6LdhmdosAAAAAGh4ojYqXCU0JOeVo3X-R1qmMaZq', true);

  const db = firebase.database();

  const roomInput = document.getElementById('room-input');
  const pasteArea = document.getElementById('paste-area');
  const status = document.getElementById('status');
  const devicesPanel = document.getElementById('devices-panel');
  const devicesList = document.getElementById('devices-list');
  const deviceCountEl = document.getElementById('device-count');
  const filePanel = document.getElementById('file-panel');
  const fileDropZone = document.getElementById('file-drop-zone');
  const fileInput = document.getElementById('file-input');
  const fileList = document.getElementById('file-list');
  const fileWarning = document.getElementById('file-warning');
  const fileProgressBar = document.getElementById('file-upload-progress');
  const fileProgressFill = document.getElementById('file-progress-fill');
  const fileProgressText = document.getElementById('file-progress-text');

  let currentRoomName = null;
  let currentRef = null;
  let memberRef = null;
  let roomRef = null;
  let imageRef = null;
  let filesRef = null;
  let isRemoteUpdate = false;
  let debounceTimer = null;

  const sessionId = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2) + Date.now().toString(36);

  function getDeviceName() {
    var ua = navigator.userAgent;
    var browser = 'Unknown Browser';
    var os = 'Unknown OS';

    if (ua.indexOf('Firefox') > -1) browser = 'Firefox';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Edg') > -1) browser = 'Edge';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Chrome') > -1 && ua.indexOf('Safari') > -1) browser = 'Chrome';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Safari') > -1) browser = 'Safari';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Opera') > -1 || ua.indexOf('OPR') > -1) browser = 'Opera';

    if (ua.indexOf('iPhone') > -1) os = 'iPhone';
    else if (ua.indexOf('iPad') > -1) os = 'iPad';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Android') > -1) os = 'Android';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Windows') > -1) os = 'Windows';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Mac OS') > -1) os = 'macOS';
    else if (ua.indexOf('Linux') > -1) os = 'Linux';
    else if (ua.indexOf('CrOS') > -1) os = 'ChromeOS';

    return browser + ' on ' + os;
  }

  function getDeviceIcon(name) {
    if (name.indexOf('iPhone') > -1 || name.indexOf('iPad') > -1) return '📱';
    if (name.indexOf('Android') > -1) return '📱';
    if (name.indexOf('macOS') > -1) return '💻';
    if (name.indexOf('Windows') > -1) return '🖥️';
    if (name.indexOf('Linux') > -1) return '🐧';
    if (name.indexOf('ChromeOS') > -1) return '💻';
    return '🌐';
  }

  function renderDevices(members) {
    devicesList.innerHTML = '';
    var count = 0;

    if (members) {
      var keys = Object.keys(members);
      count = keys.length;
      keys.forEach(function(key) {
        var member = members[key];
        var name = (typeof member === 'object' && member.name) ? member.name : 'Unknown Device';
        var li = document.createElement('li');

        var icon = document.createElement('span');
        icon.className = 'device-icon';
        icon.textContent = getDeviceIcon(name);

        var nameEl = document.createElement('span');
        nameEl.className = 'device-name';
        nameEl.textContent = name;

        li.appendChild(icon);
        li.appendChild(nameEl);

        if (key === sessionId) {
          var youBadge = document.createElement('span');
          youBadge.className = 'device-you';
          youBadge.textContent = 'You';
          li.appendChild(youBadge);
        }

        devicesList.appendChild(li);
      });
    }

    deviceCountEl.textContent = count;
  }

  function sanitizeRoomName(name) {
    return name.replace(/[.#$\/\[\]]/g, '_').toLowerCase().trim();
  }

  var lastRoomConnect = 0;
  var roomError = document.getElementById('room-error');

  function validateRoomName(name) {
    if (name.length > 32) {
      roomError.textContent = 'Room name must be 32 characters or fewer.';
      roomError.style.display = 'block';
      return false;
    }
    var now = Date.now();
    if (now - lastRoomConnect < 2000) {
      roomError.textContent = 'Please wait a moment before switching rooms.';
      roomError.style.display = 'block';
      return false;
    }
    roomError.style.display = 'none';
    lastRoomConnect = now;
    return true;
  }

  function leaveRoom() {
    if (currentRef) {
      currentRef.off();
      currentRef = null;
    }
    if (imageRef) {
      imageRef.off();
      imageRef = null;
    }
    if (filesRef) {
      filesRef.off();
      filesRef = null;
    }
    if (memberRef) {
      memberRef.onDisconnect().cancel();
      memberRef.remove();
      memberRef = null;
    }
    if (roomRef) {
      roomRef.child('cleanup').onDisconnect().cancel();
      roomRef = null;
    }
    currentRoomName = null;
    devicesPanel.style.display = 'none';
    filePanel.style.display = 'none';
    fileList.innerHTML = '';
  }

  // Rate limit: max 1 room connection per 3 seconds
  var lastRoomConnect = 0;

  function connectToRoom(roomName) {
    roomError.style.display = 'none';

    if (roomName && roomName.length > 32) {
      roomError.textContent = 'Room name must be 32 characters or fewer.';
      roomError.style.display = 'block';
      return;
    }

    var now = Date.now();
    if (now - lastRoomConnect < 3000) {
      return;
    }
    lastRoomConnect = now;
    leaveRoom();

    if (!roomName) {
      pasteArea.disabled = true;
      pasteArea.value = '';
      status.textContent = 'Enter a room name to connect.';
      status.className = '';
      updateActionButtons();
      document.getElementById('char-counter').style.display = 'none';
      window.history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname);
      document.getElementById('content-qr').style.display = 'none';

      // Reset page QR to base URL (no room hash)
      var pageQrCanvas = document.getElementById('page-qr-canvas');
      if (pageQrCanvas && typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        QRCode.toCanvas(pageQrCanvas, window.location.origin + window.location.pathname, {
          width: 120, errorCorrectionLevel: 'M', margin: 1
        });
      }
      return;
    }

    const sanitized = sanitizeRoomName(roomName);
    if (!sanitized) return;

    currentRoomName = sanitized;
    roomRef = db.ref('rooms/' + sanitized);
    currentRef = roomRef.child('content');
    var membersRef = roomRef.child('members');
    memberRef = membersRef.child(sessionId);

    // Use Firebase .info/connected to ensure presence works reliably
    var connectedRef = db.ref('.info/connected');
    connectedRef.on('value', function(snap) {
      if (snap.val() === true && memberRef) {
        // Register this session with device name
        memberRef.set({ name: getDeviceName(), joinedAt: firebase.database.ServerValue.TIMESTAMP });
        // When this client disconnects, remove its member entry
        memberRef.onDisconnect().remove();
        // When this client disconnects, set a cleanup timestamp
        roomRef.child('lastDisconnect').onDisconnect().set(firebase.database.ServerValue.TIMESTAMP);
      }
    });

    pasteArea.disabled = false;
    pasteArea.value = '';  // Clear textarea before listening to new room
    devicesPanel.style.display = 'block';
    filePanel.style.display = 'block';
    status.textContent = 'Connected to room: ' + sanitized;
    status.className = 'connected';
    updateActionButtons();
    updateCharCounter();

    // Update URL hash for sharing
    window.history.replaceState(null, '', '#' + sanitized);
    document.getElementById('content-qr').style.display = 'block';

    // Update the page QR code to include the room hash
    var pageQrCanvas = document.getElementById('page-qr-canvas');
    if (pageQrCanvas && typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
      QRCode.toCanvas(pageQrCanvas, window.location.origin + window.location.pathname + '#' + sanitized, {
        width: 120, errorCorrectionLevel: 'M', margin: 1
      });
    }

    // Watch members to handle cleanup when we detect we are the only one
    membersRef.on('value', function(snapshot) {
      var members = snapshot.val();
      var count = members ? Object.keys(members).length : 0;
      renderDevices(members);
    });

    // Watch lastDisconnect - if it gets set and members is empty after a delay, clean up
    roomRef.child('lastDisconnect').on('value', function(snapshot) {
      if (snapshot.val()) {
        // Wait a moment for onDisconnect race conditions to settle
        setTimeout(function() {
          membersRef.once('value', function(membersSnap) {
            var members = membersSnap.val();
            var count = members ? Object.keys(members).length : 0;
            if (count === 0) {
              roomRef.remove();
            }
          });
        }, 3000);
      }
    });

    // Listen for content changes
    currentRef.on('value', function(snapshot) {
      var val = snapshot.val();
      if (val !== null && val !== pasteArea.value) {
        isRemoteUpdate = true;
        var cursorPos = pasteArea.selectionStart;
        pasteArea.value = val;
        pasteArea.selectionStart = cursorPos;
        pasteArea.selectionEnd = cursorPos;
        isRemoteUpdate = false;
        updateCharCounter();
        updateContentQR(val);
      } else if (val === null && pasteArea.value) {
        // Content was deleted remotely. Only clear if we are not the ones typing.
        // Preserve local content and re-push it to avoid accidental erasure.
        var localContent = pasteArea.value;
        if (localContent.trim()) {
          currentRef.set(localContent);
        } else {
          isRemoteUpdate = true;
          pasteArea.value = '';
          isRemoteUpdate = false;
          updateContentQR('');
        }
      }
    });

    // Listen for image changes
    setupImageListener();

    // Listen for file changes
    setupFileListener();
  }

  // Room input handler
  var roomDebounce = null;
  roomInput.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      connectToRoom(roomInput.value);
    }
  });

  roomInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
    if (roomInput.value.trim()) {
      connectToRoom(roomInput.value);
    }
  });

  // Paste area handler
  pasteArea.addEventListener('input', function() {
    if (isRemoteUpdate || !currentRef) return;
    updateCharCounter();
    var limitWarning = document.getElementById('limit-warning');
    if (pasteArea.value.length >= 1000000) {
      limitWarning.style.display = 'block';
      return;
    }
    limitWarning.style.display = 'none';
    clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
    debounceTimer = setTimeout(function() {
      currentRef.set(pasteArea.value).catch(function() {
        limitWarning.style.display = 'block';
      });
    }, 150);
  });

  // Copy and Paste buttons
  var copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
  var pasteBtn = document.getElementById('paste-btn');

  function updateActionButtons() {
    var connected = !!currentRef;
    copyBtn.disabled = !connected;
    pasteBtn.disabled = !connected;
  }

  var charCounter = document.getElementById('char-counter');
  var CHAR_LIMIT = 1000000;

  function updateCharCounter() {
    if (!currentRef) {
      charCounter.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    charCounter.style.display = 'block';
    var remaining = CHAR_LIMIT - pasteArea.value.length;
    charCounter.textContent = remaining.toLocaleString() + ' characters remaining';
    if (remaining <= 0) {
      charCounter.style.color = '#dc3545';
    } else if (remaining < 50000) {
      charCounter.style.color = '#e67e22';
    } else {
      charCounter.style.color = '#888';
    }
  }

  copyBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (!pasteArea.value) return;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(pasteArea.value).then(function() {
      copyBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = 'Copied!';
      setTimeout(function() {
        copyBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = 'Copy';
      }, 1500);
    });
  });

  pasteBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    navigator.clipboard.readText().then(function(text) {
      pasteArea.value = text;
      if (currentRef) {
        var limitWarning = document.getElementById('limit-warning');
        if (text.length >= 1000000) {
          limitWarning.style.display = 'block';
          return;
        }
        limitWarning.style.display = 'none';
        currentRef.set(text);
      }
    });
  });

  // QR code for content
  function updateContentQR(text) {
    var canvas = document.getElementById('content-qr-canvas');
    var overflow = document.getElementById('qr-overflow');
    var label = document.getElementById('qr-label');
    if (!text || !text.trim()) {
      canvas.style.display = 'none';
      overflow.style.display = 'none';
      label.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    // QR max is about 2953 bytes for binary at L error correction
    if (text.length > 2900) {
      canvas.style.display = 'none';
      overflow.style.display = 'block';
      label.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    overflow.style.display = 'none';
    label.style.display = 'block';
    canvas.style.display = 'block';
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
      QRCode.toCanvas(canvas, text, { width: 200, errorCorrectionLevel: 'L', margin: 1 }, function(err) {
        if (err) {
          canvas.style.display = 'none';
          overflow.style.display = 'block';
          label.style.display = 'none';
        }
      });
    }
  }

  // Update QR when content changes (from remote or local)
  var originalContentListener = pasteArea.oninput;
  pasteArea.addEventListener('input', function() {
    updateContentQR(pasteArea.value);
  });

  // Also update QR on remote changes - hook into the value listener
  var origOnValue = null;

  // --- Image paste support ---
  var imagePanel = document.getElementById('image-panel');
  var sharedImage = document.getElementById('shared-image');
  var copyImageBtn = document.getElementById('copy-image-btn');
  var clearImageBtn = document.getElementById('clear-image-btn');
  var imageSizeLabel = document.getElementById('image-size-label');
  var imageWarning = document.getElementById('image-warning');
  var MAX_IMAGE_BYTES = 700000; // ~500KB actual image

  function compressImage(file, callback) {
    var reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(e) {
      var img = new Image();
      img.onload = function() {
        var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        var maxDim = 1920;
        var w = img.width;
        var h = img.height;

        // Scale down if too large
        if (w > maxDim || h > maxDim) {
          if (w > h) {
            h = Math.round(h * maxDim / w);
            w = maxDim;
          } else {
            w = Math.round(w * maxDim / h);
            h = maxDim;
          }
        }

        canvas.width = w;
        canvas.height = h;
        var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);

        // Try JPEG first at quality 0.7, fall back to lower quality if too big
        var quality = 0.7;
        var dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality);

        if (dataUrl.length > MAX_IMAGE_BYTES) {
          quality = 0.5;
          dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality);
        }
        if (dataUrl.length > MAX_IMAGE_BYTES) {
          quality = 0.3;
          dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality);
        }

        callback(dataUrl.length <= MAX_IMAGE_BYTES ? dataUrl : null);
      };
      img.src = e.target.result;
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  }

  function showImage(dataUrl) {
    if (dataUrl) {
      sharedImage.src = dataUrl;
      imagePanel.style.display = 'block';
      var sizeKB = Math.round(dataUrl.length * 3 / 4 / 1024);
      imageSizeLabel.textContent = sizeKB + ' KB';
      imageWarning.style.display = 'none';
      imagePanel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
    } else {
      sharedImage.src = '';
      imagePanel.style.display = 'none';
      imageSizeLabel.textContent = '';
    }
  }

  function setupImageListener() {
    if (imageRef) imageRef.off();
    if (!roomRef) return;
    imageRef = roomRef.child('image');
    imageRef.on('value', function(snapshot) {
      var val = snapshot.val();
      showImage(val);
    });
  }

  // Listen for paste events with images
  document.addEventListener('paste', function(e) {
    if (!roomRef) return;
    var items = e.clipboardData && e.clipboardData.items;
    if (!items) return;

    // Check if clipboard contains an image
    var imageItem = null;
    for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
      if (items[i].type.indexOf('image') > -1) {
        imageItem = items[i];
        break;
      }
    }

    // Only handle if there's an image and no text content being pasted into textarea
    if (!imageItem) return;

    // If the user is focused on the textarea and clipboard also has text, let text paste through
    if (document.activeElement === pasteArea) {
      var hasText = false;
      for (var j = 0; j < items.length; j++) {
        if (items[j].type === 'text/plain') {
          hasText = true;
          break;
        }
      }
      if (hasText) return;
    }

    e.preventDefault();
    var file = imageItem.getAsFile();
    if (!file) return;

    imageWarning.style.display = 'none';
    compressImage(file, function(dataUrl) {
      if (dataUrl) {
        roomRef.child('image').set(dataUrl);
      } else {
        imageWarning.textContent = 'Image too large even after compression. Try a smaller screenshot.';
        imageWarning.style.display = 'block';
      }
    });
  });

  // Copy image to clipboard
  copyImageBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (!sharedImage.src) return;
    // Convert to PNG blob via canvas (clipboard API requires image/png)
    var img = new Image();
    img.onload = function() {
      var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width = img.naturalWidth;
      canvas.height = img.naturalHeight;
      var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
      canvas.toBlob(function(blob) {
        if (blob && navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.write) {
          var item = new ClipboardItem({ 'image/png': blob });
          navigator.clipboard.write([item]).then(function() {
            copyImageBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = 'Copied!';
            setTimeout(function() {
              copyImageBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = 'Copy as PNG';
            }, 1500);
          }).catch(function() {
            copyImageBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = 'Failed';
            setTimeout(function() {
              copyImageBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = 'Copy as PNG';
            }, 1500);
          });
        }
      }, 'image/png');
    };
    img.src = sharedImage.src;
  });

  // Clear image
  clearImageBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (roomRef) {
      roomRef.child('image').remove();
    }
  });

  // --- File sharing support ---
  var MAX_FILE_SIZE = 7 * 1024 * 1024; // 7 MB raw (leaves headroom for DB overhead under 10MB limit)

  // Allowed text-based MIME types and extensions
  var ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = [
    'txt', 'md', 'markdown', 'json', 'xml', 'yaml', 'yml', 'toml',
    'csv', 'tsv', 'log', 'ini', 'cfg', 'conf', 'env', 'properties',
    'html', 'htm', 'css', 'scss', 'sass', 'less',
    'js', 'mjs', 'cjs', 'ts', 'tsx', 'jsx', 'vue', 'svelte',
    'py', 'rb', 'php', 'java', 'c', 'cpp', 'h', 'hpp', 'cs', 'go',
    'rs', 'swift', 'kt', 'kts', 'scala', 'clj', 'ex', 'exs',
    'sh', 'bash', 'zsh', 'fish', 'bat', 'cmd', 'ps1', 'psm1',
    'sql', 'graphql', 'gql', 'proto',
    'r', 'R', 'rmd', 'qmd', 'tex', 'bib', 'sty',
    'lua', 'vim', 'el', 'lisp', 'scm', 'hs', 'ml', 'mli',
    'pl', 'pm', 'tcl', 'awk', 'sed',
    'dockerfile', 'makefile', 'cmake', 'gradle', 'sbt',
    'gitignore', 'gitattributes', 'editorconfig', 'eslintrc',
    'prettierrc', 'babelrc', 'npmrc', 'nvmrc',
    'tf', 'tfvars', 'hcl',
    'svg', 'plist', 'ics', 'vcf', 'rtf',
    'patch', 'diff',
    'rst', 'adoc', 'asciidoc', 'org', 'wiki',
    'ipynb', 'rmd'
  ];

  var ALLOWED_MIME_PREFIXES = ['text/', 'application/json', 'application/xml',
    'application/javascript', 'application/typescript', 'application/x-yaml',
    'application/toml', 'application/sql', 'application/graphql',
    'application/x-sh', 'application/x-python', 'application/x-ruby'];

  function isTextFile(file) {
    // Check MIME type
    if (file.type) {
      for (var i = 0; i < ALLOWED_MIME_PREFIXES.length; i++) {
        if (file.type.startsWith(ALLOWED_MIME_PREFIXES[i]) || file.type === ALLOWED_MIME_PREFIXES[i]) return true;
      }
    }
    // Check file extension
    var ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
    if (ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS.indexOf(ext) > -1) return true;
    // Files with no extension or common dotfiles
    var baseName = file.name.split('/').pop().toLowerCase();
    if (baseName.startsWith('.') || ['makefile', 'dockerfile', 'gemfile', 'rakefile', 'vagrantfile', 'procfile', 'brewfile'].indexOf(baseName) > -1) return true;
    // Check MIME type starts with text/
    if (file.type && file.type.startsWith('text/')) return true;
    // If type is empty and extension not recognized, allow if size is reasonable (likely text)
    if (!file.type && file.size < MAX_FILE_SIZE) return true;
    return false;
  }

  function formatFileSize(bytes) {
    if (bytes < 1024) return bytes + ' B';
    if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) return (bytes / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';
    return (bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1) + ' MB';
  }

  function setupFileListener() {
    if (filesRef) filesRef.off();
    if (!roomRef) return;
    filesRef = roomRef.child('files');
    filesRef.on('value', function(snapshot) {
      renderFileList(snapshot.val());
    });
  }

  function renderFileList(files) {
    fileList.innerHTML = '';
    if (!files) return;
    Object.keys(files).forEach(function(fileId) {
      var fileData = files[fileId];
      var li = document.createElement('li');

      var icon = document.createElement('span');
      icon.className = 'file-icon';
      icon.textContent = '📄';
      li.appendChild(icon);

      var name = document.createElement('span');
      name.className = 'file-name';
      name.textContent = fileData.name;
      li.appendChild(name);

      var size = document.createElement('span');
      size.className = 'file-size';
      size.textContent = formatFileSize(fileData.size);
      li.appendChild(size);

      var dlBtn = document.createElement('a');
      dlBtn.className = 'file-download';
      dlBtn.textContent = 'Download';
      dlBtn.href = '#';
      dlBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        downloadFile(fileId, fileData.name);
      });
      li.appendChild(dlBtn);

      var rmBtn = document.createElement('button');
      rmBtn.className = 'file-remove';
      rmBtn.textContent = '✕';
      rmBtn.title = 'Remove file';
      rmBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        removeFile(fileId);
      });
      li.appendChild(rmBtn);

      fileList.appendChild(li);
    });
  }

  function uploadFile(file) {
    if (!roomRef || !currentRoomName) return;

    if (file.size > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
      fileWarning.textContent = 'File "' + file.name + '" exceeds 7 MB limit.';
      fileWarning.style.display = 'block';
      return;
    }

    if (!isTextFile(file)) {
      fileWarning.textContent = 'File "' + file.name + '" is not a recognized text-based file type.';
      fileWarning.style.display = 'block';
      return;
    }

    fileWarning.style.display = 'none';
    fileProgressBar.style.display = 'block';
    fileProgressFill.style.width = '0%';
    fileProgressText.textContent = 'Reading ' + file.name + '...';

    var fileId = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2) + Date.now().toString(36);
    var reader = new FileReader();

    reader.onprogress = function(e) {
      if (e.lengthComputable) {
        var progress = (e.loaded / e.total) * 50;
        fileProgressFill.style.width = progress + '%';
      }
    };

    reader.onload = function(e) {
      var content = e.target.result;
      fileProgressFill.style.width = '50%';
      fileProgressText.textContent = 'Saving ' + file.name + '...';

      roomRef.child('files/' + fileId).set({
        name: file.name,
        size: file.size,
        content: content,
        uploadedAt: firebase.database.ServerValue.TIMESTAMP,
        uploadedBy: sessionId
      }).then(function() {
        fileProgressBar.style.display = 'none';
        fileProgressFill.style.width = '100%';
      }).catch(function(error) {
        fileProgressBar.style.display = 'none';
        fileWarning.textContent = 'Upload failed: ' + (error.message || 'File may be too large for sync.');
        fileWarning.style.display = 'block';
      });
    };

    reader.onerror = function() {
      fileProgressBar.style.display = 'none';
      fileWarning.textContent = 'Failed to read file "' + file.name + '".';
      fileWarning.style.display = 'block';
    };

    reader.readAsText(file);
  }

  function downloadFile(fileId, fileName) {
    if (!roomRef) return;
    roomRef.child('files/' + fileId + '/content').once('value', function(snapshot) {
      var content = snapshot.val();
      if (content === null) {
        fileWarning.textContent = 'Download failed: file may have been removed.';
        fileWarning.style.display = 'block';
        return;
      }
      var blob = new Blob([content], { type: 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' });
      var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      var a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = url;
      a.download = fileName;
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    });
  }

  function removeFile(fileId) {
    if (roomRef) {
      roomRef.child('files/' + fileId).remove();
    }
  }

  // File drop zone handlers
  fileDropZone.addEventListener('click', function() {
    fileInput.click();
  });

  fileDropZone.addEventListener('dragover', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fileDropZone.classList.add('dragover');
  });

  fileDropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fileDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
  });

  fileDropZone.addEventListener('drop', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    fileDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
    if (!roomRef) return;
    var files = e.dataTransfer.files;
    for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
      uploadFile(files[i]);
    }
  });

  fileInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
    if (!roomRef) return;
    var files = fileInput.files;
    for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
      uploadFile(files[i]);
    }
    fileInput.value = '';
  });

  // Auto-connect from URL hash on page load
  var hashRoom = window.location.hash.replace('#', '').trim();
  if (hashRoom) {
    roomInput.value = hashRoom;
    connectToRoom(hashRoom);
  }

  // Best-effort cleanup on page close
  window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() {
    if (memberRef) {
      memberRef.remove();
    }
  });
})();
</script>
```
